title: Bunny's Better Vanilla
description: This is a collection of mods and resource packs I have accumulated over the years that make Minecraft a better experience
body:
This is a collection of mods and resource packs I have accumulated over the years that make Minecraft a better experience. It adds some support for optifine textures, Has some performance enhancing mods, has some building mods for singleplayer, and some other mods to make your experience just that much better (such as BetterF3) I made this pack because all the other modpacksi have found have had something missing or to many features, which is too much for my computer. This modpack aims to make Minecraft smoother and add some cosmetics while not being over packed with features. I believe this modpack is perfect for people who want Minecraft to run faster and look better, while not wanting every button to do something different removed stuff: Resource Packs:
  • Xali's Potions v1.0.0 by xalixilax
  • Icons v1.9.2 by mr_ch0c0late and Zartix
  • Even Better Enchants by mythitorium


Shader Packs:
  • Complimentary Shaders - Unbound v4.7.1 by EminGT

Legal Stuff:

  • As this is a modpack, bugs due to older mods may arise. If any do arise, please check the issue link
  • NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT
